title: Kadhal Oru Pallikoodam Lyrics Aasai Aasaiyaai
stanzas: <div>Kadhal Oru Pallikoodam Lyrics Aasai Aasaiyaai

Kadhal, Oru pallikoodam
kangal, adhil paadamaagum
kattraal, adhu vedhamaagum
neeyum kadhal sei.

kadhal, nam sondha swaasam
kadhal, nam aanma thaagam
kadhal, nam raththa ottam
neeyum kadhal sei.

ulagathin jeeva sakthi
pasi kadhal rendum thaan.
pasi kooda theerndhu pogum
theeraadhu kadhal thaan.

nee kadhal seiga
un jenmam velga.
nee kadhal seiga, aaga
nam kadhal vazhga.

Kadhal, Oru pallikoodam
kangal, adhil paadamaagum
kattraal, adhu vedhamaagum
neeyum kadhal sei.(2)

kadhal, nam sondha swaasam
kadhal, nam aanma thaagam
kadhal, nam raththa ottam
neeyum kadhal sei.

uyir thandha, udal thandha
un petrorai kadhal sei.
mozhi thandha, vazhi thandha
un guruvai nee kadhal sei.

oru neram pasi thandha
un suttram ne kadhal sei.
uyir thandhu uyir kaakkum
un natpai nee kadhal sei.

megam ennum oru thaayil
.. siru minnal.
adhai kadhla sei.

boomi enum pon kattil
veli kaasaai vizhum
mazhaiyai nee kadhal sei.

udhirndhu udhirndhu pinnum
malarndhu malarndhu
vandhu mulaikkum kozhundhinai
adhal sei.

kuraindhu kuraindhu thinam
karaindhu karaindhu pinnum
valarum pirayai nee kadhal sei.

Kadhal, Oru pallikoodam
kangal, adhil paadamaagum
kattraal, adhu vedhamaagum
neeyum kadhal sei.

kadhal, nam sondha swaasam
kadhal, nam aanma thaagam
kadhal, nam raththa ottam
neeyum kadhal sei.

Parundhodu siru kozhi
prandhadikkuthe andha
kobathai kadhal seiga.

nizhal neetta marakoottam
veyil thaanguthe, adha
thiyagathai kadhal seiga.

arivoottidum un varumaiyai
nee kadhal sei.
adhai neekkidum un
thiramaiyai ne kadhal sei.

[naadu kaadu engum
narambai pola varum
nadhigalai kadhal seiga.

annai eendravudam
nammai yendhi konda
mannai kadhal seiga.] (2)

dhesathukku por chinnam
dhesiya kodiyai kadhal sei.
dhesiya kodikku vali sindhum
sippaai padaiyai kadhal sei.

Kadhal, Oru pallikoodam
kangal, adhil paadamaagum
kattraal, adhu vedhamaagum
neeyum kadhal sei.

kadhal, nam sondha swaasam
kadhal, nam aanma thaagam
kadhal, nam raththa ottam
neeyum kadhal sei.

ulagathin jeeva sakthi
pasi kadhal rendum thaan.
pasi kooda theerndhu pogum
theeraadhu kadhal thaan.

nee kadhal seiga
un jenmam velga.
nee kadhal seiga
un jenmam velga, aaga
nam kadhal vazhga.

Kadhal, Oru pallikoodam
kangal, adhil paadamaagum
kattraal, adhu vedhamaagum
neeyum kadhal sei.

kadhal, nam sondha swaasam
kadhal, nam aanma thaagam
kadhal, nam raththa ottam
neeyum kadhal sei.

seo.title: Kadhal Oru Pallikoodam Lyrics Aasai Aasaiyaai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Oru Pallikoodam?

The song explores the theme of love as a learning experience, comparing it to a school where emotions are lessons.

Who is the singer of this song?

Sujatha Mohan lends her soulful voice to this beautiful melody.

Who composed the music for Aasai Aasaiyaai?

The music was composed by Mani Sharma, known for his captivating melodies.

What is the release year of the movie Aasai Aasaiyaai?

The movie was released in 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kadhal Oru Pallikoodam is a poignant song from the movie Aasai Aasaiyaai, capturing the essence of love as an educational journey. The lyrics by Vairamuthu poetically describe love as a school where every emotion is a lesson. Sujatha Mohan's soothing voice adds depth to the melody, making it a perfect song for romantic occasions. Mani Sharma's composition enhances the emotional impact, creating a timeless piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kadhal Oru Pallikoodam from the movie Aasai Aasaiyaai is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by the soulful Sujatha Mohan, with lyrics by the legendary Vairamuthu, this song is a testament to Mani Sharma's musical brilliance. Dive into a world where love is a school, and every emotion is a lesson to be cherished.
stanzaMeanings: Love is like a school for the eyes, where the lessons are the breeze, and it becomes a scripture. You also love.
Love is our own breath, love is our soul's thirst, love is our blood flow. You also love.
The life force of the world is hunger and love. Hunger can be satisfied, but love never ends.
When you love, your life wins. When you love, our love lives.
Love is like a school for the eyes, where the lessons are the breeze, and it becomes a scripture. You also love.
Love is our own breath, love is our soul's thirst, love is our blood flow. You also love.
Love your parents who gave you life and body. Love your teacher who gave you language and direction.
Love your surroundings that gave you hunger for a moment. Love your friend who gives life and protects life.
In the cloud that is like a mother, there is a small lightning. Love that.
Love the rain that falls on the golden bed of the earth.
Love the plant that keeps blooming and growing even after shedding.
Love the moon that keeps growing even after waning and melting every day.
Love is like a school for the eyes, where the lessons are the breeze, and it becomes a scripture. You also love.
Love is our own breath, love is our soul's thirst, love is our blood flow. You also love.
Love the anger that flies with the small bird and the eagle.
Love the sacrifice of the tree that extends its shade and bears the sun.
Love your poverty that gives you wisdom. Love your talent that removes it.
Love the rivers that come like nerves everywhere in the country and forest.
Love the land that our mother gave us and carried us.
Love the national flag, the symbol of war for the country. Love the soldiers who shed blood for the national flag.
Love is like a school for the eyes, where the lessons are the breeze, and it becomes a scripture. You also love.
Love is our own breath, love is our soul's thirst, love is our blood flow. You also love.
The life force of the world is hunger and love. Hunger can be satisfied, but love never ends.
When you love, your life wins. When you love, your life wins, and our love lives.
Love is like a school for the eyes, where the lessons are the breeze, and it becomes a scripture. You also love.
Love is our own breath, love is our soul's thirst, love is our blood flow. You also love.
